chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْحُلِيِّ وَ سَبَائِكِ الذَّهَبِ وَ نُقَرِ الْفِضَّةِ وَ الْجَوْهَرِ زَكَاةٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – There is no Zakāt upon the ornaments, and the gold alloys, and the silver carvings and the jewels

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/35)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/35)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْحُلِيِّ أَ يُزَكَّى فَقَالَ إِذاً لَا يَبْقَى مِنْهُ شَيْ‏ءٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Yaqoub Bin Shuayb who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the ornaments, ‘Should I purify (pay Zakāt)?’ So heasws said: ‘Then there would not remain anything from it’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Safwan ibn Yahya from Ya’qub ibn Shu’ayb who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if there is Zakat on jewelries. He (the Imam) said, ‘If so nothing will remain thereof.’”
